# cloudflare_zero_trust_gateway_pacfile (Data Source)

Accepted Permissions

- `Zero Trust Read`
- `Zero Trust Write`

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cloudflare_zero_trust_gateway_pacfile" "example_zero_trust_gateway_pacfile" {
  account_id = "699d98642c564d2e855e9661899b7252"
  pacfile_id = "ed35569b41ce4d1facfe683550f54086"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `pacfile_id` (String)

### Optional

- `account_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `contents` (String) Actual contents of the PAC file
- `created_at` (String)
- `description` (String) Detailed description of the PAC file.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `name` (String) Name of the PAC file.
- `slug` (String) URL-friendly version of the PAC file name.
- `updated_at` (String)
- `url` (String) Unique URL to download the PAC file.
